caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt featuring the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in front of a professional microphone. He is in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and clothing racks in the background, including a white mannequin torso. A logo featuring a red circle and the text "BOSSLY TOT" appears in the bottom right corner, while a white and black "BOSSLY" logo is visible on the left. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He begins by looking slightly to the side with his hand near his chest, then shifts his gaze and opens his mouth wider as he continues talking. In the final frames, he raises his hand further in an expressive gesture while maintaining a conversational expression.
